commands.review_summary:
The PR makes state-migration argv classification use the root-option-aware command path, delays startup-memory temp-home/RSS hook creation until after argument validation, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +44, Other +9. Total +53 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main uses the non-root-option-aware command path for state migration and creates startup-memory temp state before argument validation. I did not run the failing commands because this review is read-only.
